name: Golden Minerals Co
summary: Golden Minerals Company is an exploration-stage mining company focused on gold, silver, and copper projects. It holds majority control in the Sarita Este/Desierto concessions in Salta Province, Argentina, a 60% interest in the Sand Canyon gold-silver project in northwestern Nevada, and other immaterial mineral exploration properties in Argentina and Mexico. The company does not currently produce or sell minerals.
